Public food garden with a row of strawberries. Good size, excellent taste. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
600 Fort Hill Rd, Peekskill, NY 10566, USA

Large wineberry plants at the cemetery gates and several smaller ones along the edge of the cemetery wall, opposite the abbey. Plants may overhang into the cemetery proper, causing access issues on days when the gates are shut. More available on the path down
